items.title: The Mercury lead the Sparks 19-18 after one quarter of play. Dearica Hamby scored the first seven points for LA and then went quiet offensively. She remains the Sparks’ top scorer as the team struggled to put points on the board. They went 6-23 from the field in the first.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Mercury lead the Sparks 19-18 after one quarter of play. Dearica Hamby scored the first seven points for LA and then went quiet offensively. She remains the Sparks’ top scorer as the team struggled to put points on the board. They went 6-23 from the field in the first.

items.title: A 20 min (real time) 1st quarter is pretty damn fast
items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt: A 20 min (real time) 1st quarter is pretty damn fast

items.title: End Q1 | Mercury 19, Sparks 18 | Dearica Hamby leads the Sparks with 7 points; Hamby scored or assisted on the team’s first 10 of the quarter. Sparks shot just 26%, but Phoenix connected on only 39% and had 6 turnovers. Alyssa Thomas has 6 rebounds and 4 assists for Phoenix.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: End Q1 | Mercury 19, Sparks 18 | Dearica Hamby leads the Sparks with 7 points; Hamby scored or assisted on the team’s first 10 of the quarter. Sparks shot just 26%, but Phoenix connected on only 39% and had 6 turnovers. Alyssa Thomas has 6 rebounds and 4 assists for Phoenix.

items.author: Joe Freeman
items.body_excerpt:
“I feel great about it,” Kevin Calabro said of his decision to leave Portland. “I was grateful to have one of 30 jobs in the league and work so close to my home in Seattle.

"I’ll always be a part of Blazers history. I made some great memories and some great friends."

items.title: Josh Hart on Noah Clowney scoring a career high 31 points on him: “I’m not gonna lie, the funniest part is that it’s end of the 4th and I’m about to sub out the game and he’s like ‘Yo man can I get a 3?’ I look at the score and I’m like “I don’t care, but you better make it.”
